hypothesis.statement: The V13 black crowns, dark trunks, and ground smears were caused by InstancedStaticMeshes shader permutations being created only after HISM placement.
hypothesis.test: Persist InstancedStaticMeshes usage on the bark and leaf materials, finish material compilation, save both packages, then create the transient HISM corridor layer and repeat the same paired guide-seat and river-eye captures.
hypothesis.result: Both V14 comparison captures are byte-for-byte identical to their V13 comparison captures, so late shader-permutation creation was not causal.

accepted_findings: Bark and leaf materials now carry explicit InstancedStaticMeshes usage before HISM creation, closing a real editor-order and packaged-runtime readiness defect.
The source-masked placement pipeline remains deterministic at 1,200 trees per view with the V13 near, mid, and runtime-far representation counts.
Byte-identical V13 and V14 captures provide a bounded negative result instead of allowing shader-permutation timing to remain an untested explanation.
rejection_reasons: Explicit instanced-material usage produces no visual change in either controlled view.
Bare dark trunks, black crown clumps, elongated ground or shadow smears, and visually empty slopes remain present exactly as in V13.
The coigue corridor layer remains less lifelike than the sparse fallback foliage and cannot be promoted.
Smooth 30 m terrain, provisional flat water, sparse rocks, and absent native understory remain independent scene blockers.
next_iteration_requirements: Capture a shadow-disabled native-leaf diagnostic while leaving geometry, placement, exposure, terrain, water, and camera fixed.
Capture an opaque unlit or simple-lit leaf-card diagnostic with leaf shadows disabled to prove whether crown geometry survives at near, mid, and runtime-far distances.
Use those controlled results to isolate masked opacity and mip behavior from two-sided foliage transmission, lighting, shadowing, and distance-crown geometry before changing production materials.
Retain all diagnostic layers as transient review-only components and keep saved-map, collision, water, solver, and GeoClaw authority unchanged.
